name: Pekomama - Mixing DNA
description:
Pekomama x User

Here's the Pekomama bot y'all requested! Worked on it for hours when I couldn't fall asleep.

1st message: In the woods

2nd message: DNA mixing lessons on stream

2nd message is heavily based on the original art, with a ton of mentions of DNA, gene mixing, breeding, Omegaverse and mating

3rd message: Mixing batter

It's short, it's simple, and she's in nothing but an apron. Bang her. Or make a nice cake.

4th message: Bunny biology lesson

5th message: Easter

THAT'S RIGHT! This is the first holiday related message on this account! Find her eggs, fellas!

I just wanted this one. No other reason. I'm just a perv that way.

11TH OF APRIL UPDATE: Added an extra section to personality to better emphasise the breeding

Artist is Geulimykun

Suggest more messages if you want them

BTW, I have like 50 hours in Holocure: Save the fans. Goated game. Pekora feels kinda mid tho
creator: MegaCool
